3257.name: The West Edge Of Golgar`s Temple
3257.description: To the west the wall of the temple show vivid scenes of all the vices personified. All the pictures are vivid with color and inlaid with gold and jewels.

3258.name: The Temple Of Golgar
3258.description: A wall seems to be visible to the west in the red gloom that hangs about the chamber. To the east, the pillars seem to be less threatening at a safe distance.

n.to_room_name: The West Edge Of Golgar`s Temple

w.to_room_name: The South West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple

3247.name: Corridor of Praise
3247.description: A small corridor leads to the north into a larger and more forbidding room. It seems that the only way to go is north, or back up.

3249.name: Golgar`s Temple
3249.description: Huge columns support a ceiling of red stalagmites covered in a bright red ochre of moss. Red mists drift lazily around the interior of the chamber. The aura of evil is present everywhere.

n.to_room_name: The East End Of Golgar`s Temple

3254.name: The Door of Agony
3254.description: Screaming figures chased by unnameable horrors are emblazoned on the front of this great door. Great hinges and huge knockers make this a forbidding site.

e.to_room_name: The North Wall Of The Temple

w.to_room_name: The North West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple

npcs.name: Red daemon guard
npcs.description: This demon guard is powerfully built, and his red scales make

3260.name: Golgar's Forge
3260.description: The cavern has been carved out here to make way for a large forge. Using the dwarves' labor and architecture through slavery. The daemons have adopted a way to fashion arms and armor for themselves, and quite possible others, judging by the sheer size of the forge and crafted gear available. The cavern opens up to the south and east here while the sheer heat of flames attack you. The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

n.to_room_name: The South West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple

s.to_room_name: The South West Corner of Golgar's Forge

npcs.name: Troll smith, yarbelek
npcs.description: Yarbelek, fabled trollsmith, appears to have been subverted.. his eyes are glazed, the will drained from him.

3252.name: The North East End Of Golgar`s Temple
3252.description: The corner of the temple offers some respite from the gloom and red mist that hang about the pillars in the great chamber.

w.to_room_name: The North Wall Of The Temple

npcs.name: Red priest
npcs.description: The red robe that flows over this priest seems to writhe and

3262.name: A Cramped Passageway
3262.description: An opening in the rocky cavern offers a path to a familiar scent of fresh water to the west, while east returns to the musky sulfur smell of Golgar's inner lair. The walls glisten with the reflection of a water source, which seems to combat the red glow of the lair. w

e.to_room_name: The South West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple

3263.name: Landing Before The Lake
3263.description: A spacious rocky landing offers safety from the stench of sulfur, which seemingly wafts in from a passageway to the east. The cavern offers no other apparent exit aside from diving into the lake itself, leading who knows where. The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

npcs.name: Red daemon overlord
npcs.description: This tall, sharp-tailed daemon commands the space with his posture and infernal aura. The daemon overlord, arms crossed, controls the conversation with a low, guttural infernal voice to back it up.

npcs.name: Xymaran quartermaster
npcs.description: A lanky reptilian warrior clad in iron armor skulks about, pacing as he works through negotiations with the daemons of Golgar's lair.  His demeanor appears assertive, but respectful of the future relations for equipment supply.

3255.name: The North West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple
3255.description: To the south, great pillars rise from the gloom. To the east, a huge door looms up almost unexpectedly. This seems to be a safe place, except for the walls that almost ... move? The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

3256.name: The Pillar of Will
3256.description: Scenes of strife and power illuminate the surface of this great erection. A dark beauty pervades the reliefs; it seems at once that the images were at one time much more fair. You are a bit unsure of the relevance of this pillar, but nevertheless it instills a great feeling of confidence and direction in you.

n.to_room_name: The North West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple

w.to_room_name: The West Edge Of Golgar`s Temple

3259.name: The South West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple
3259.description: The walls of the temple are richly arrayed with sensuous pictures and reliefs. Many scenes depict the ultimate in pain and despair, as well as, many depictions of the vices.

3261.name: The South West Corner of Golgar's Forge
3261.description: An enormous staging area for arms and armor have been set aside here next to an array of anvils directly to the east. Racks made of loose iron rods and driftwood make up the storage area. If the heat wasn't enough, the cacophony of hammers clanging against anvils barrages your ears. The forge opens up to the east, while the north offers a way to escape the heat and noise.

npcs.name: Dwarven slave
npcs.description: A lifetime of slavery has taken its toll on this poor dwarf. Jagged scars upon his back are a memento of countless lashings.

3336.name: The Pillar of Sulfur
3336.description: Yellow, putrid and odoriferous characterize this evil looking monstrosity. A pillar made of sulfur stands ominously before you, the stench of which causes you to gag in uncontrollable fits. Dark iron veins are threaded with bright yellow sulphur crystals.

3337.name: Southern Wall of Golgar's Forge
3337.description: The area is littered with anvils for the final preparation of the forge production. Wooden buckets of water for quenching the iron accompany each anvil. Tools are strewn about, mostly discarded from overuse. Better watch your step.

e.to_room_name: South East Corner of Golgar's Forge

w.to_room_name: The South West Corner of Golgar's Forge

3338.name: South East Corner of Golgar's Forge
3338.description: Dozens of molds are strewn about and meticulously placed to receive molten iron through funnels of stone that originate from the smelting pot to the north. Quite the operation. The various molds make up an odd-looking set of armor; not quite that of the average humanoid.

n.to_room_name: North East Corner of Golgar's Forge

3339.name: North East Corner of Golgar's Forge
3339.description: An enormous smelting pot for siphoning out the iron from the ore has been carved out of the cavern stone itself. Various funnels of stone rock carry the molten metal towards the south, caught by an array of molds. If you were looking for the source of the heat, you found it. The boiling pot is fueled by a roaring inferno below it.

s.to_room_name: South East Corner of Golgar's Forge

3340.name: Northern Wall of Golgar's Forge
3340.description: The excavated forge opens up in all directions here, except to the north. The heat from the furnaces to the southeast carries itself throughout the area. A staging area for raw iron ore is scattered about here haphazardly. Taking a quick glance, you notice that an assembly line has been made for rapid production of arms and armor.

e.to_room_name: North East Corner of Golgar's Forge

3341.name: The Pillar Of Death
3341.description: A huge figure with skeleton hands and sunken eyes is set into the ebony surface of this pillar. A chill seems to sit about the pedestal of the stone monolith, and for a fleeting instant you see piles of objects and bones lying about, lost in their timeless tomb...

3342.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3342.description: A red room spreads out before you. It seems incredibly hot and the red haze in the room adds to the perception.

3343.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3343.description: The haze is lifting and a great altar is to the north. The chamber is almost inviting, but the heat is constant.

3344.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3344.description: The red colors of the chamber are numbing. The altar to the north recedes then comes closer with each heartbeat.

3345.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3345.description: Skulls and bones, skulls and bones, bones and blood are what comprise this hellish altar. Blood bespackled and gore begrimed, a blade sits upon it. Bright yellow flowers bloom here, their petals tinged with mineral dust.

3346.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3346.description: Bones dripping with red gore make up the altar that sits to the north. A pile of bones and skulls are at its base. A strange blade sits upon it.

3347.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3347.description: Skulls and bones comprise the altar that sits to the north. Blood colored stains drip from its surface. A great blade rests upon it.

3348.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3348.description: To the east, there is a large altar that bears the mark of some evil patron.

3349.name: Sacrificial Altar
3349.description: A grotesque altar stands here. It is made of bone. It is covered in blood. It is evil. A gaping skull peers up from the edge of this malevolent object.

3350.name: Throne Room
3350.description: A large throne sits here. It is made completely of skulls. It looks to be from the late hell period.

npcs.name: Daemon Golgar
npcs.description: The Demon Golgar, Lord of the Lair, is here.

3532.name: The Pillar of Pain
3532.description: A huge pillar stands here. It is covered with horrifying images of the most excruciating kind. Beasts of unknown origin are set in deep relief on the surface of the pillar and they act out the hideous dance of writhing infliction and receiving of pain. As you linger here, pain begins to invade your body, rising in tempo until you find it difficult to concentrate, your muscles contracting involuntarily...your mind screams at you to leave!

3533.name: The Pillar of Lust
3533.description: This pillar is shaped as a huge male gland, though it doesn't seem necessarily human, and scenes of debauchery cover its veined surface. Wicked and obscene seem to be the main characteristic of the reliefs and they seem to have an effect on you. You begin to daydream while remembering the physiques of past lovers...

3534.name: The Pillar Of Confusion
3534.description: Another pillar stands before you. It is a riotous mix of scenes that make the eyes swim. Great reliefs illustrating the most unharmonious of actions, scenes of intense discord and wild motion which beg to drag you into their insanity. Your mind reels and your memories become clouds of forgotten names and places, images you insist on recognizing, but which mystify, a sensation of being lost.

3535.name: The Pillar of Despair
3535.description: Images of famine, disease and the visages of hopeless souls on the verge of self-destruction jump out of the seductively carved stone of this pillar. To look at it for any length of time would be a great test of the soul and as you do you look upon yourself as if disembodied, sweeping through emaciation, the ravages of disease and the grimaces of racking pain. Too long here and you will begin to fade away...

3536.name: Golgar`s Chambers
3536.description: A huge pile of bones spill from the west onto the floor. Slime and fleshy muck make it a slippery surface to walk on.

3248.name: The Corner Of Golgar`s Temple
3248.description: Large columns take most of the interior that is visible from here. A red glow fills the huge chamber and makes visibility difficult in the gloom. Shapes, both large and small, seem to flit about the mist.

3250.name: The East End Of Golgar`s Temple
3250.description: A red haze fills the air and a palpable presence of evil seems to lurk near bye. A powerful malignity seems to emanate from all around.

npcs.name: Red daemon guard
npcs.description: This demon guard is powerfully built, and his red scales make

3251.name: The Pillar Of Greed
3251.description: The sheen of pure gold reflects off the pillar before you. Scenes of avarice fill the reliefs that seem molded from the very bones of the pillar. As you scan the sometimes humorous panels of the pillar you find yourself often thinking that you should have the gold and gems that you've heard others possess. It isn't fair that they have it and you don't. You must do something about this as soon as possible.

e.to_room_name: The East End Of Golgar`s Temple

n.to_room_name: The North East End Of Golgar`s Temple

3253.name: The North Wall Of The Temple
3253.description: A dreadful vision stares out at you from the gilded walls to the north. The image is of some strange demonic beast. The eyes seem to follow your every step. Bright yellow flowers bloom here, their petals tinged with mineral dust.

e.to_room_name: The North East End Of Golgar`s Temple

3233.name: The Lower Storeroom
3233.description: Boxes and crates line the rock walls of the chamber. A small table sits in the middle of the room with an oil lamp on it. Rats glare at you from amid the loose straw on the ground.

3239.name: Entrance to Golgar`s Mine
3239.description: Quartz and sulfur seem to be in abundantly embedded into the west side of the tunnel. Marks of mine work lead into the darkness to the west. A narrow seam of copper is stained yellow with sulphuric deposits.

3240.name: Golgar`s Sulfur Mine
3240.description: A gaping, yellow maw of rock fills the chamber. Tools lay heaped in great profusion about the raped earth. Small torches are pounded into the walls and the buttresses of wood seem hardly capable of holding the great weight of the rock above.

npcs.name: Rock troll
npcs.description: His face is so grey, it almost looks like granite.

3243.name: East Troll Turn
3243.description: To the north and the west are the only avenues of advancement from this turn in the tunnel.

3244.name: Hound Way
3244.description: Sets of leashes are tied to strange posts along the wall to the east. To the west, there seems to be some kind of stains along the wall at about a meter from the floor. You have lost 144 experience.

npcs.name: Hellhound
npcs.description: Whisps of smoke curl off patches of smoldering fur, and the reek of brimstone tinges its fetid breath.  A ragged tongue lolls past broken teeth, saliva dripping to the ground with an audible sizzle.

npcs.name: Kennel master
npcs.description: This kennel master is clothed in black leather.

3245.name: Hound Way
3245.description: Many dark blotches are on the floor. They are circular in shape and piled up in concentrically smaller circles. Small bits of bone stick up from the surface of these piles.

npcs.name: Kennel master
npcs.description: This kennel master is clothed in black leather.

3246.name: Kennel of the Hellhounds
3246.description: Large pieces of bone, shattered and crushed, lay all about the floor. Many remnants of clothing are intermixed with the debris that lays about. A few unidentifiable bits of meat sit within the ghoulish mixture. You have lost 432 experience.

3351.name: Hell Corner
3351.description: South and west offer the only ways to go. To the south, there is a smell that is canine in nature. To the west, there seems to be a slightly egg like smell.

3352.name: Troll Way
3352.description: The marks on these walls are very different from the south tunnel. They seem to be from a different type of troll or clan of trolls. The marks are more artistic, though not as deeply hammered into the rock.

3353.name: Troll Way
3353.description: Few troll markings are in evidence in the tunnel. A strange aura makes the walls seem to vibrate almost imperceptibly. Dry wisps of air, filled with a sulfurous aroma, pass through the tunnel.

3354.name: Troll Way
3354.description: The markings seem to be dissipating slowly to the east. But, the remaining carved surfaces seem to ooze a malignant energy. The scrapes in the floor seem to reach up and hold the feet of anything that passes by.

3355.name: Troll Common
3355.description: One large table dominates the room. There are no chairs, nor are there pieces of silverware, only many enormous trenchers stacked one upon the other.

3356.name: Troll Quarters
3356.description: Behemoth beds stretch across the large chamber. These beds seem built for giants, not trolls, and they are hard and lumpy.

3357.name: Troll Way
3357.description: Strange throbbings come from the multitude of carvings and symbols etched into the rough rock walls of the tunnel. Strong sulfur smells slip through the air in a sensuous serenade of odor.

3358.name: Troll Way
3358.description: Designs fill the walls and floor. They are of a fantastic nature, many look like arcane symbols from some dark and lurid dream. Their size, however, makes them stand out and become more than illusion.

3359.name: North Troll Turn
3359.description: To the south, the smell of earth works and sulfur cling to the air. To the east, strange carvings in the ground and walls add a sense of foreboding. A narrow seam of copper is stained yellow with sulphuric deposits.

3360.name: Entrance to Golgar`s Mine
3360.description: The west side of the tunnel gleams with the crystalline formations of sulfur and quartz laden rock. Huge gashes mar the surface of the tunnel and an unearthly smell emanates from the walls. Bright yellow flowers bloom here, their petals tinged with mineral dust.

3234.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
3234.description: Huge marks cover the walls in traditional troll style. Their proportions add a feeling of weight to the walls and ceilings of the tunnel. Some of the symbols seem to glow and pulsate with an eerie red hue.

3235.name: The Lower Storeroom
3235.description: Great casks of wine and ale are stacked against the west wall of the chamber. Spider webs obscure other storage vats making their contents difficult to see. Pieces of broken bone are cast all about in wild profusion.

3236.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
3236.description: This section of tunnel show the characteristic marks and design of troll workmanship. Heavy, crude, and Gothic proportions call attention to the builders of this earthen way.

3237.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
3237.description: The tunnel walls are scarred and broken. Huge symbols carved with crude efficiency are everywhere. Even the ground has rough circles and arcane symbols torn into it.

npcs.name: Evil grunt
npcs.description: This daemonic grunt patrols the novice halls, keeping order and on the lookout for intruders. Its hooves stomp about, snarling as it paces the halls.

3238.name: Troll Turn
3238.description: Heavy stones are piled in the corner of the turn. North and east are the only ways available from here.

3241.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
3241.description: Many troll marks cover the walls in mute testimony to the gigantic handiwork of the artisans responsible for the tunnel. An evil glow erupts from the scars which make up some of the larger symbols.

3242.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
3242.description: The tunnel starts to show less of the traditional troll marks and more strange, arcane symbols. The glow from the marks starts to increase to the east.

3530.name: Golgar`s Sulfur Mine
3530.description: Huge chunks of sulfur rest upon the floor of the chamber. Pick and shovel marks, along with what seem like claw marks, line the back of the chamber. Smells like rotten eggs fill the air as puffs of yellow smoke seem to puff out of the scarred walls. Bright yellow flowers bloom here, their petals tinged with mineral dust. A narrow seam of copper is stained yellow with sulphuric deposits.

3531.name: Kennel of the Hellhounds
3531.description: A few pieces of cloth sit in the corner and a small table and chair rest against the far north wall. A leash and a small whip rest on the table. You have lost 432 experience.

3218.name: The Tunnel Of Obedience
3218.description: Many chains are scattered about, as well as huge shackles and restraints. It looks as if this area could hold a lot of unwilling servants in permanent bondage.

3219.name: The Chamber Of Persuasion
3219.description: Large barrels filled with strange metal items fill the room as they are set at the base of many cots that have restraints built in. In addition, there are braziers between each row of cots.

npcs.name: Overseer
npcs.description: He's a large human, and he seems to enjoy whipping the orcs.

3220.name: The Overseer`s Cage
3220.description: The bars in the door make a depressing sight. The Overseer`s Cage. (1/1)

npcs.name: Orimick
npcs.description: Orimick looks badly bruised and beaten, but his spirits aren't. He remains quite optimistic despite his situation. Something to be said for dwarves and

3221.name: The Arch Of Service
3221.description: A large arch spans the entrance to the west. On it are strange letters carved in an interesting script.

3222.name: Slave Corner
3222.description: Strange carvings cover the walls, and they all seem to depict the importance of servile industriousness. Strange rings with chains attached dot the walls to the south.

3223.name: South Of The Smith
3223.description: A looming darkness covers the area as soot and ash coat the floor and surrounding walls. The stench of smoke lingers in the air, making it difficult to breathe.

n.to_room_name: Former Smithy of Yarbelek the Troll

3224.name: Former Smithy of Yarbelek the Troll
3224.description: Heat once shimmered here indicated by the blackened furnace. Soot is everywhere with footsteps leading in and out of the area. A large indent in the ground indicates that something heavy was dragged out of here. An empty barrel is the only thing that remains, rotting and falling apart.

3225.name: The Echoing Tunnel
3225.description: A strange pulsation seems to reverberate through the tunnel. It seems to sound like distant breathing. The air also seems to be getting hotter toward the west.

3226.name: Turn In The Tunnel
3226.description: The tunnel takes a sharp turn toward the south. To the west, there seems to be a muffled sound that is constant and rhythmic.

3227.name: The Novice`s Arch
3227.description: A great arch looms into the tunnel from the east. Rough hewn stones create a strange presence in the arch; almost as if there were some malignant force inhabiting it.

3228.name: Kitchen Corner
3228.description: Strong smells of cooking come from the west. Underneath the odors there seems to be a strange reptilian scent intermixed with a strong odor of decay.

3229.name: Kitchen Dump
3229.description: A small lizard sits chained to the wall. All about him the burnt refuse of the slave kitchen sits scattered.

3230.name: The Dining Area
3230.description: Small trenchers lay scattered about the floor amongst scraps of decayed food. The odor of cooked matter fills the air about you. The walls appear to have small protrusions carved in them that serve as places to sit. The accommodations are definitely not elegant.

3231.name: Slaves Kitchens
3231.description: Pots of boiling water send billowing clouds of steam throughout the kitchen. Cooking utensils hang from the walls and ceiling intertwined with strange meats and cheeses. In fact, the meat has an uncomfortable resemblance to something that you cant seem to put you finger on.

npcs.name: Daemon cook
npcs.description: Slightly larger than the rest, this daemon appears responsible for serving food to the lair, and he has the gut to prove it.

3232.name: Kitchen Storeroom
3232.description: Large barrels and boxes litter the floor. There seems to be very little order within the room. Strong smells pound your proboscis. You can't go that way.

3333.name: The Novice`s Mess
3333.description: Large tables are set end to end in the center of the room, and they appear to be prepared for dinner. Plates, forks, and knives are lined up along the outer edge of the tables in an orderly way.

3334.name: Novice`s Chambers
3334.description: Bunk beds fill the spartan room. Huge piles of blankets fill the corners of the room along side of a strange altar with melted candles atop it.

3335.name: Cook Corner
3335.description: Strange odors drift past your nose. To the north, there seems to be the soft chime of metal on stone. To the east, the tunnel continues.

3206.name: Deep In The Lair
3206.description: The faint odor of sulfur permeates the tunnel. Small streams of water trickle down and along the rough walled shaft.

3207.name: The Drafty Tunnel
3207.description: The scent of fresh air fills the room as a slight breeze drifts by.

3208.name: The Drafty Tunnel
3208.description: The air flows faster and cleaner from the east. To the west, there seems to be growing darkness.

npcs.name: Dwarven slave
npcs.description: A lifetime of slavery has taken its toll on this poor dwarf. Jagged scars upon his back are a memento of countless lashings.

3209.name: The Drafty Tunnel
3209.description: Air rushes through the tunnel creating a low mournful hum. Small gnats thicken the air and make it hard to breath.

3210.name: The Drafty Tunnel
3210.description: The smell of water fills the air. However, there are other smells that begin to gnaw away the pleasant coolness.

3211.name: The Rough Turn
3211.description: The air seems to be slightly clearer here, as if there were a source of fresher air in the vicinity. The tunnel continues to the north and west. Remembrance of the Zephyr is no longer on cooldown! The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

npcs.name: Dwarven slave
npcs.description: A lifetime of slavery has taken its toll on this poor dwarf. Jagged scars upon his back are a memento of countless lashings.

3212.name: The Deep Lair
3212.description: The tunnel continues to the east and west. There seems to be a lot of moisture dripping from the walls. The floor is damp, but not slippery.

3213.name: The Tunnel D`toilette
3213.description: Piles of orcan refuse stream out into the tunnel from the south. Hoards of maggots burrow through the defacatory expulsions and one rather large maggot eyes you curiously with red glowing eyes. The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

3214.name: Le Toilette de Orc
3214.description: Piles of Orcan feces cover the floor, and amongst it writhe strange creatures that struggle for existence.

3215.name: The Deep Lair
3215.description: The tunnel runs both north and east from here. To the north, there seems to be a faint light and to the east only blackness.

3216.name: Outside The Slave`s Quarters
3216.description: The light from the slave`s quarters spills out into the tunnel. Grim evidence of physical cruelty lay strewn across the floor: bits of chain, discarded rags stained with blood, and piles of rat gnawed bones.

npcs.name: Dwarven slave
npcs.description: A lifetime of slavery has taken its toll on this poor dwarf. Jagged scars upon his back are a memento of countless lashings.

npcs.name: Evil grunt
npcs.description: This daemonic grunt patrols the novice halls, keeping order and on the lookout for intruders. Its hooves stomp about, snarling as it paces the halls.

3217.name: Slaves Quarters
3217.description: Chains hang from all the walls making a macabre melody as they rustle against the rock walls. Bunk beds fill the interior of the room and a strange box sits in the corner.

npcs.name: Dwarven slave
npcs.description: A lifetime of slavery has taken its toll on this poor dwarf. Jagged scars upon his back are a memento of countless lashings.

npcs.name: Evil novice
npcs.description: Not yet a full daemon, the novice's frame is twisted and malformed. Evil radiates out from him like a tangible fog, chilling to the bone.

3330.name: Near The Slave Quarters
3330.description: To the south there are strange bits of debris strewn across the floor. The light emanating from the south cast long shadows in the tunnel. To the east, the tunnel continues in darkness.

npcs.name: Dwarven slave
npcs.description: A lifetime of slavery has taken its toll on this poor dwarf. Jagged scars upon his back are a memento of countless lashings.

3331.name: The Deep Lair
3331.description: Faint noises echo in the tunnel as the trickle of water sets the background rhythm.

3332.name: The Deep Lair
3332.description: The walls stream with mineral laden waters and iridescent pools settle along the edges of the tunnel.

3537.name: The Beating Chamber
3537.description: The ring of metal on metal seems to be coming from somewhere, but it also seems to be coming from everywhere.

3197.name: The Upper Reaches
3197.description: The rough walls seem to stretch to the east and to the west. There seems to be a smell coming from the east, but you cant seem to put your nose ... er, finger... on it.

npcs.name: Tiny rock elemental
npcs.description: Made up of swirling pebbles and a rocky core, this creature seems to be a product of magical interference somewhere within the lair.

3198.name: The Western Turn
3198.description: The tunnel takes a sudden turn south or east depending on which way you're headed.

3199.name: In The Tunnel
3199.description: The rock walls seem to crush down upon you as you make your way. Strange crevices hide small things with glowing eyes.

3200.name: Another Turn
3200.description: The way south has abruptly ended with a wall of rock; only north and east are available to you.

3201.name: The Tunnel
3201.description: Rough rock still bears the mark of some ancient digging tool; giant slashes into the rock give mute testimony to the toil that took place in this subterranean passage.

3202.name: The Tunnel
3202.description: The tunnel seems to contract and expand and you feel some kind of presence, an evil presence, emanating from the rock.

3203.name: The Way Round
3203.description: The tunnel seems to be getting more polished in appearance. Only the way to the north and west seem open.

3204.name: The Tunnel
3204.description: The tunnel seems to reach out with a myriad of teeth; but, of course those are only the evidence of whatever had cut out this path into the rock.

3205.name: The Eastern Turn
3205.description: The tunnel has many sharp projections that may make travel difficult. The south and west seem to be the only ways that the tunnel continues.

npcs.name: Cave wight
npcs.description: Pallid and spindly, the cave wight has large round eyes that seem to reflect the light when it hits them just so.  His movements are deft and cat-like and he seems to slither rather than walk.

2210.name: River Canyon
2210.description: The crashing river travels from the east to plunge over a subterranean cliff and dive into mist-filled depths. Fortunately, a number of eddies slow the swiftness of the current keeping you from being pulled into the waterfall. A narrow and damp ledge offers dry, if a bit slippery, land and a safe passage to the west. You sense an immense and heavy ceiling high above your head, but the sight of it is lost from view in the dimness.

2211.name: River Canyon
2211.description: The river fills this canyon with unbearable stertoration. The sounds of the rapids echo off the rock walls, greatly amplifying the noise. The river bends southeast and continues downstream to the west.

2212.name: River Canyon
2212.description: The rapids pick up a bit of speed as they crash around a bend in the canyon. The water has carved out some interesting patterns in the rock, but trying to scale the canyon would likely be suicidal. It is a very long climb, and the rock is slick from the water constantly spraying upwards due to the river's speed.

2213.name: River Canyon
2213.description: The river continues its seemingly endless flow, unhindered by the vast canyon that surrounds it. The waters bank against the northern wall of the canyon with a decent amount of force because of the bend in the river to the southeast.

2214.name: River Canyon
2214.description: The subterranean river seems to narrow slightly as it bends to the northwest. Navigating it might be tricky and will certainly require a good deal of caution, lest you be dashed against the rock wall of the canyon. The way east seems a good deal safer.

2217.name: River Canyon
2217.description: The river crashes against the face of the rock canyon here as it bends from the southeast. The rapids are a bit more swift here than you have encountered along the rest of the subterranean river, likely due to the way it rebounds against the surface of the rock as it bends. It seems as though the rapids have eroded some small cracks into the north canyon wall.

2218.name: River Canyon
2218.description: The river bends sharply around a rocky outcropping to the northwest, picking up speed as it flows downstream out of sight. However it is still quite calm here, and looks to be the same to the east. A few dwarves float by you in small boats, fishing lines dangling over the sides.

2215.name: River Canyon
2215.description: The river unfortunately seems to have no bank along its entire length, instead making its way through the narrow canyon and filling up every inch it can reach.

2216.name: River Canyon
2216.description: The rapids are somewhat quicker here than along the rest of the river, as it haphazardly carves a path through the deep canyon. Taking care to remain as close to the center as the river as possible, you gently direct your small craft as best you can along its course. The river flows swiftly downstream to the southwest.

2219.name: River Cadain
2219.description: To the south, a large opening in the canyon leads back to a small dwarvish village. That must be where all these fishermen are coming from. It appears the dwarves blasted and carved out the cavern, as it lies a few feet above the level of the river, and along it are places to dock a small boat and climb to dry land.

2220.name: River Cadain
2220.description: A number of vessels crowd the small river here, and you try to navigate through them without bumping anyone. Many boats feature one or two fishermen tending half a dozen lines, while the dwarves on the other boats cast nets into the water. A small village sprawls out to the south of the river, as the canyon offers a cavernous opening here.

2221.name: River Cadain
2221.description: A small village bustles to the south, with a few places along the riverbank to dock. More than a few fisherman crowd the narrow river though, making progress a bit slow. A few scowl at you as you pass by for scaring away their fish.

2222.name: River Cadain
2222.description: A few fishing boats float lazily about the slow moving river here, their occupants seeming moments away from drifting off into slumber as they dangle their lines in the water. A few notice you, but only take the time to glance in your direction before turning back to their lines.

2223.name: River Cadain
2223.description: Small fish break the river surface before you, flashing through the air for an instant before plunging back into the water. You impulsively fling your arm toward one of the more nimble creatures, and are immediately thrown off balance. Your boat rocks perilously for a few moments, and then gradually stabilizes.

2224.name: River Cadain
2224.description: If not for the unmistakable passage of the stone walls on either side of the river it would be easy to assume that you were at a standstill. Glancing morosely at the featureless rock, you paddle on.

2225.name: River Cadain
2225.description: A rock ceiling looms dangerously low here, and you decide it would be in your best interest to keep your head low lest you wind up needing stitches. The river heads downstream to the southeast, bending out of sight. The source of this subterranean waterway lies somewhere off to the east, where the noise of rapids bouncing off rock walls can be heard quite clearly.

2226.name: Riverbank
2226.description: The river has collected into a shallow and small deposit here, allowing you to pull your craft ashore. Dry land lies to the north and west, seeming to be some sort of city.

2209.name: The Upper Reaches
2209.description: Globs of decaying matter seem to writhe on the floor. However, the disgusting goo seems to trail off to both the east and the west. To the south, there is only a rough hewn wall.
